page_metadata.bioconda__summary: De novo transcriptome assembler for short reads
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: De novo transcriptome assembler for short reads
page_metadata.biotools__summary: De novo transcriptome assembler designed to produce transcripts from short read sequencing technologies. It uploads a preliminary assembly produced by Velvet, and clusters the contigs into small groups, called loci. It then exploits the paired-end read and long read information, when available, to construct transcript isoforms.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: De novo transcriptome assembler designed to produce transcripts from short read sequencing technologies. It uploads a preliminary assembly produced by Velvet, and clusters the contigs into small groups, called loci. It then exploits the paired-end read and long read information, when available, to construct transcript isoforms.
